summary: FY Opening Balance Carry-Forward Testing - ALL TESTS PASS. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 7 requested features verified working correctly.

1_monthly_report_data_loading.details: Staff Management > Monthly Report tab loads correctly with staff attendance summary showing Present, Absent, Half Day, Holiday, Est. Salary, Advance columns

2_mill_parts_summary_opening_stock.details: /api/mill-parts/summary?kms_year=2025-2026 returns opening_stock field for each part

3_diesel_accounts_summary_opening_balanc.details: /api/diesel-accounts/summary?kms_year=2025-2026 returns opening_balance per pump and grand_opening_balance

4_local_party_summary_opening_balance.details: /api/local-party/summary?kms_year=2025-2026 returns opening_balance per party and grand_opening_balance

6_partwise_summary_no_search_bar.details: Part-wise Summary tab shows ONLY dropdown selector (-- Part Select Karein --), NO text search bar

7_ob_columns_in_frontend_tables.details: OB columns verified in: Mill Parts Stock Summary table (OB column), Local Party All Parties table (OB (Rs.) column)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 - All FY Opening Balance features verified. Backend APIs return opening_stock/opening_balance fields correctly. Frontend tables display OB columns. Monthly Report tab loads data correctly. Part-wise Summary tab correctly shows only dropdown (no text search). All 11 pytest tests pass.
